markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Usman's content workflow and introduce new efficiency tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Workflow:** Block calendar for 1–1.5 hr focus sessions to improve output and meet the Wednesday midday deadline.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - **Faster Linking:** Use Google's `site:domain.com "phrase"` operator for internal linking, cutting the task from \~45 mins to \<15 mins.
  - **Refresh Strategy:** Use SEMrush to find refresh opportunities (e.g., informational keywords ranking \#4–15) and Google's `site:` operator to validate them.
  - [**Smith.ai Content:** New articles must be purely educational, non-promotional, and adhere to a strict style guide.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)

## Topics

### Workflow & Time Management

  - [**Problem:** Usman's availability on Slack/Linear causes frequent context switching, reducing output.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**Solution:** Block calendar for 1–1.5 hr focus sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
      - [Turn off notifications during these blocks.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Check Slack only 3–4 times per day.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Contingency:** Notify Jo and Megan of any planned time off (even 1–2 days) to arrange for backup CMS coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Internal Linking Optimization

  - [**Problem:** Internal linking is a major time sink (\~45 mins/article) because Atlas's suggestions are inaccurate, requiring manual verification.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**Solution:** Use Google's `site:domain.com "phrase"` operator.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
        1.  [Identify a potential anchor phrase in the article.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
        2.  [Search Google using the operator to find relevant pages on the site.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
        3.  [Link directly to the best result.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - **Result:** This method is faster (\<15 mins) and more accurate, eliminating the need for corrections.

### Finding Content Refresh Opportunities

  - [**Goal:** Identify opportunities to improve existing content, including landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [**Method 1: SEMrush Organic Research**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
        1.  [Enter the domain (e.g., `smith.ai`).](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
        2.  Apply advanced filters:
              - [Exclude branded keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
              - [Filter by keyword (e.g., "virtual receptionist").](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
              - Filter by position (\#4–15) to find pages on the cusp of page one.
        3.  [Analyze search intent for each keyword to determine if it's a good fit for the page.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**Method 2: Google Site Search**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
        1.  [Use `site:domain.com "phrase"` to find all pages containing a target phrase.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
        2.  [Filter by URL folder (e.g., `site:smith.ai/blog "virtual receptionist"`) to target specific content types.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
        3.  [Paste the resulting URLs into SEMrush to analyze their keywords and positions.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

### Smith.ai Content Guidelines

  - [**Core Principle:** Content must be purely educational and non-promotional.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
      - [Avoid mentioning Smith.ai abruptly; focus on providing deep, actionable value.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [**Style Guide:** Adhere to strict formatting rules (e.g., spaces around em dashes).](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
      - [Review the CoFlow design pillar article for examples of revisions made to meet these standards.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [**Image Creation:** Awaiting a brand kit from Julian.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - [Once received, Jo will create a ticket for Katia to produce on-brand images.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)

### Exec Content OS Updates

  - [**Task:** Change the status of all suggested Exec articles from "Backlog" to "Considering."](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Required Fields:** For all assignments, ensure the following columns are filled:](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [**Action Type:** `new` or `SEO`](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [**Volume:** Keyword search volume](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [**Cluster:** `platform comparisons` or `buyer's guide`](https://fathom.video/share/Z_whzAadJzZBhCvNPW3mx_zMbejsANcL?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
